description: End-to-end fixture for the Make+Bear CDB-generation path. Proves that when CODEBOARDING_CPP_GENERATE_CDB=1 is set and the project has only a bare Makefile, CodeBoarding drives 'bear -- make clean all', writes compile_commands.json to .codeboarding/cdb/, and clangd analyzes the result correctly. Values were captured empirically from a live run.
